74632.subject: In Speech To Stanford Grads, Alphabet CEO Gives ‘Timeless Advice’ Instead Of Discussing AI
74632.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/speech-stanford-grads-alphabet-ceo-gives-timeless-advice-51nnc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B3MGEAe4eRoaXrCvls6zWng%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2G14IuaJSd6ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqh5apiu~1h-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqh5apiu-1h
  
Good evening, Google and corporate parent Alphabet are at the center of the artificial intelligence revolution. However, CEO Sundar Picha did not bring up AI’s impact on the workforce in his commencement address at Stanford University, a leader in AI research. Pichai instead offered the grads the three principles that helped him “get more moments right than wrong.” Here’s what he said. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Matteo Della Torre/NurPhoto via Getty Images Cyber Experts Urge White House To Reverse Ban On Anthropic’s Fable Model Critics say preventing cyber defenders from accessing the most advanced model for finding and exploiting vulnerabilities hamstrings their ability to protect systems. David Paul Morris via Bloomberg How SoFi Went From Fintech Darling To Wall Street Pariah The 15-year-old company, born in Silicon Valley, is being forced to face the harsh Wall Street reality that, at its core, it is little more than a consumer bank.
Приєднатися до обговорення

  ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­͏   ­

https://framer.link/v5Lc0bh


We’re writing to let you know that we've updated our legal terms to reflect how Framer works today. We also made changes to ensure
our terms are clear and easy to understand.

Here are the main changes:


 1. Terms of Service. We’ve reworded these for clarity and added new sections, including how affiliates can use Framer and how
    purchases through resellers work. You can read them https://www.framer.com/legal/terms-of-service/here
    [https://www.framer.com/legal/terms-of-service/].

 1. Data Processing Addendum. We’ve added a comprehensive security annex, including references to our certifications reinforced
    (ISO 27001:2022 and SOC 2 Type 2), reinforced our cross-border data transfer mechanisms, and set out a clearer data breach
    notification process. You can read it here [https://www.framer.com/legal/data-processing-addendum/].

 1. Privacy Statement. We’ve clarified Framer's roles and responsibilities towards the different types of users of Framer, set out
    specific data retention periods, and explained your privacy rights and how to exercise them in more detail. You can read it
    here [https://www.framer.com/legal/privacy-statement/].

 1. Cookie Statement. You can now see every cookie we use, its purpose, duration, and whether it needs your consent - along with
    clearer options for managing your preferences. You can read it here [https://www.framer.com/legal/cookie-statement/].

 1. AI Notice. This is new. Our AI Notice explains how we use AI across Framer, the safeguards we apply, and everyone’s
    responsibilities. It also covers how inputs and outputs may be used. You can read it here
    [https://www.framer.com/legal/ai-notice/].


These changes take effect on June 16, 2026. We encourage you to review what’s relevant to your use of Framer. We’re always working
to be more transparent. If anything is unclear or you have questions, just reach out at legal@framer.co

 [ https://cabinet.astromix.net ]
Здравствуйте, Олег!
15 июня наступает новолуние в Близнецах. И если вы когда-либо задавались вопросом, почему астрологические события и таро часто упоминают вместе -- сейчас хороший момент это объяснить.
Таро и лунные циклы описывают одно и то же -- но разными языками. Луна в астрологии отвечает за внутреннее состояние человека, за то, что происходит под поверхностью: эмоции, интуиция, скрытые страхи и желания. 
Карты таро работают с тем же слоем. Не с тем, что вы думаете о ситуации, а с тем, что вы на самом деле чувствуете -- но еще не сформулировали. 
 Вытянуть карты [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/taro/mastertaro?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
Именно поэтому в моменты лунных событий расклад даёт особенно точный ответ: внутренний слой в эти дни ближе к поверхности, чем обычно, и карты считывают его яснее.
​
Вытягивать карты можно уже с 14 июня -- энергия новолуния активна за сутки до и сутки после. Олег, три карты в этой точке покажут -- что именно открывается для вас в новом цикле, какой разговор или решение требует вашего внимания и с чего начать, чтобы этот цикл прошёл осознанно, а не по инерции.
 Вытянуть карты [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/taro/mastertaro?user=0dC8ClzHWrfrWti6LJJA_opLoca-HNNamA4NbU ]
 Новолуние -- это всегда начало нового цикла. Не в смысле «всё обнулилось», а в смысле -- появляется точка входа. Что-то, что раньше казалось закрытым, снова становится возможным. 
 Теперь в Astromix вы можете задать свой вопрос и вытянуть карты самостоятельно 💜
Это ваше личное пространство для поиска ответов. Всё работает очень просто, но при этом глубоко:
Сформулируйте намерение. Сосредоточьтесь на вопросе, который сейчас беспокоит вас больше всего. Важно почувствовать этот запрос внутри.
Выберите свои карты. Доверьтесь интуиции и

74624.subject: 🔷 The Daily: BlackRock's new Bitcoin ETF
74624.body:
Binance may be forced to halt services for EU clients next month | Robinhood cuts 10% of staff, expects $28 million in restructuring charges | Coinbase launching tokenized US stocks, backed 1:1, with holders able to receive dividends | Bitcoin Policy UK CEO calls Michael Saylor's STRC investment promotion 'dishonest' |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin's* latest rally back above $65,000 and another *HYPE* all-time high have lifted sentiment, but analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404920/bitcoin-rally-hype-record-run-market-waiting-real-conviction-analysts?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) at *Wintermute* , *Glassnode* , and *Bitfinex* warn that ETF flows, stablecoin growth, and institutional demand still fall short of confirming a lasting market reversal.

In today's newsletter, *BlackRock* launches a new *Bitcoin* ETF, *Binance* could reportedly lose its EU license bid, *Robinhood* cuts 10% of its staff, and more.

Meanwhile, *SEC* Chair *Paul Atkins* defended ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404956/sec-atkins-defends-cftc-selig-questions-agencys-ability-regulate-prediction-markets?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *CFTC* Chair *Michael Selig* despite questions over the agency's ability to regulate prediction markets.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🚀 BlackRock launches new Bitcoin ETF that generates income using a covered call strategy*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404825/blackrock-launches-new-ishares-bitcoin-premium-income-etf-covered-call-nasdaq?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*BlackRock* launched its *iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (BITA)* , a new fund that combines *bitcoin* exposure with monthly income generated from option premiums.

* BITA holds spot bitcoin and shares of BlackRock's *IBIT* ETF, while selling call options on roughly 25%-35% of its IBIT position to generate yield for investors.
* BlackRock said the product targets investors seeking bitcoin exposure alongside income, allowing them to retain most upside potential while collecting option premium distributions.
* The launch adds to a growing category of covered-call bitcoin ETFs as issuers l

74623.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Ripple expands into Africa through a Flutterwave investment. Standard Chartered sees major upside for Uniswap if tokenized assets move onchain. Binance faces potential MiCA licensing hurdles in Europe. Coinbase plans tokenized shares with dividend payments while Ethereum’s next major upgrade enters final development stages. Bitcoin weakens alongside oil as markets react to easing geopolitical tensions. 💹 Ripple targets Africa’s remittance market with Flutterwave investment Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction. Find out more 💸 Standard Chartered’s $100 Uniswap call exposes the open DeFi problem Wall Street may need to solve The reported $100 UNI target hinges on tokenized assets leaving closed rails for liquid, composable markets. The post Standard Chartered’s $100 Uniswap call exposes the open DeFi problem Wall Street may need to solve appeared first on CryptoSlate. Source 📰 Binance Faces Potential EU Exit as MiCA License Approval Doubts Grow Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange, could soon face one of its biggest regulatory challenges in Europe. Reports suggest its application is facing a potential rejection of its MiCA license application in Greece. Discover more 🔑 Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities. Read more 📊 Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment. Explore more 🪙 State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market. Source 📈 Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78 Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum, with traders seeing a quick end to the BTC price rebound. More details Stay ahead in crypto. Get vital market updates and trends delivered directly to your
